questions.question: What is science?
questions.correct_answer: A way of thinking, observing and doing things to understand the world we live in
questions.explanation: Science helps us unravel mysteries and answer questions about the universe

questions.question: Who are scientists?
questions.correct_answer: People who follow the scientific method to solve problems or discover new things
questions.explanation: Anyone can be a scientist by following the scientific method

questions.question: What is the scientific method?
questions.correct_answer: A step-by-step process of observing, questioning, guessing, testing and analyzing results
questions.explanation: The scientific method helps us find answers to our questions

questions.question: Why do we need curiosity?
questions.correct_answer: To ask questions and explore the world around us
questions.explanation: Curiosity is essential for learning science

questions.question: What does science help us understand?
questions.correct_answer: The world we live in, from tiny grains of sand to massive mountains
questions.explanation: Science helps us understand the universe and its mysteries

questions.question: How do scientists work together?
questions.correct_answer: In large teams across the world
questions.explanation: Scientists often collaborate on research projects

questions.question: What is an example of the scientific method in action?
questions.correct_answer: Trying to figure out why a pen stopped writing
questions.explanation: The scientific method helps us solve everyday problems

questions.question: Why do we need to explore our surroundings?
questions.correct_answer: To discover new things and ask questions
questions.explanation: Exploration is essential for learning science

questions.question: What is the connection between ideas in science?
questions.correct_answer: They are all connected and help us understand the world better
questions.explanation: Science is a web of interconnected ideas and concepts

questions.question: Why do we need to ask questions?
questions.correct_answer: To find answers and explore the world around us
questions.explanation: Asking questions is essential for learning science

important_notes.title: The Scientific Method
important_notes.content: A step-by-step process of observing, questioning, guessing, testing and analyzing results to find answers to our questions

important_notes.title: Curiosity is Key
important_notes.content: We need to be curious to ask questions and explore the world around us

important_notes.title: Science is Everywhere
important_notes.content: Science helps us understand the world we live in, from tiny grains of sand to massive mountains

important_notes.title: Collaboration in Science
important_notes.content: Scientists often work together in large teams across the world to advance our understanding of the universe

important_notes.title: Exploration is Essential
important_notes.content: We need to explore our surroundings to discover new things and ask questions

important_notes.title: The Connection between Ideas
important_notes.content: Ideas in science are all connected and help us understand the world better

important_notes.title: Asking Questions is Essential
important_notes.content: We need to ask questions to find answers and explore the world around us

important_notes.title: The Scientific Method is a Process
important_notes.content: It involves observing, questioning, guessing, testing and analyzing results to find answers to our questions

important_notes.title: Science Helps Us Understand
important_notes.content: Science helps us understand the world we live in, from tiny grains of sand to massive mountains

important_notes.title: Curiosity is a Habit
important_notes.content: We need to cultivate curiosity to ask questions and explore the world around us

facts.fact: Science is all about joyful exploration and asking questions
The scientific method helps us find answers to our questions
Curiosity is essential for learning science
Scientists often work together in large teams across the world
Exploration is essential for learning science
Ideas in science are all connected and help us understand the world better
Asking questions is essential for learning science
The scientific method involves observing, questioning, guessing, testing and analyzing results
Science helps us understand the world we live in, from tiny grains of sand to massive mountains
Curiosity is a habit that can be cultivated through practice and experience
